summary: Complete testing of Stripe checkout integration and SFTP support. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). All 6 frontend features verified successfully.

issues: Minor React warning: 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component' in HashRouter/Login - does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/stripe/config/status - Public endpoint returns {enabled, configured, is_live_mode}
Backend: POST /api/stripe/create-checkout - Returns 404 for invalid plan
Backend: POST /api/stripe/create-checkout - Creates checkout session with valid plan
Backend: POST /api/stripe/create-checkout - Supports yearly billing cycle
Backend: GET /api/stripe/plans - Returns available subscription plans
Backend: POST /api/suppliers/ftp-test - Returns error for bad SFTP credentials
Backend: POST /api/suppliers/ftp-test - Still supports regular FTP
Backend: GET /api/stripe/my-subscription - Returns user subscription info
Frontend: Subscriptions page shows 4 plans (Free, Starter, Professional, Enterprise)
Frontend: Confirmation dialog shows plan details (name, cycle, price)
Frontend: When Stripe enabled, dialog shows 'Pago seguro con Stripe' info
Frontend: When Stripe enabled, dialog shows 'Ir a Pagar' button
Frontend: FTP browser has SFTP protocol option in 'Protocolo FTP' dropdown
Frontend: FTP browser shows 'Múltiple' button for multi-select mode
Frontend: Multi-select mode shows checkboxes, 'Seleccionar todos', and 'Añadir' button
critical_code_review_comments: Checkout endpoint correctly fetches plan price from server (never trusts frontend amounts)
Transaction recorded in database before Stripe redirect
SFTP support uses paramiko library correctly
FTP browser multi-select button conditionally shown when supported files exist
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user and public SFTP server test.rebex.net
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe integration fully functional with checkout sessions. SFTP support working with paramiko. FTP browser has multi-select mode ('Múltiple' button) that shows when supported files are present. Stripe config status is public at /api/stripe/config/status. Checkout requires auth and creates real Stripe sessions.
